title: Add latency regression guards
summary: Adds targeted regression coverage and benchmark helpers so the reduced-latency paths do not drift back into slow repeated work.
scope_items: Add focused regression tests or benchmark helpers around the optimized hotspots instead of broad unstable timing assertions.
Document the benchmark set and any guardrails needed to keep the improvements measurable and maintainable.
done_when_items: The optimization tranche has durable regression coverage that protects the hotspot boundaries that were changed.
The benchmark or profiling helper path is clear enough to reuse in later latency work.
